MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Mark Haesloop, Esq. for Plaintiff: All Planets Holdings, Inc., a nevada Corp.
